Trade with Simple One Click
Multiple assets, slippage control, we are making a DEX for everyone to use.
Best Mining Reward in MATMO
We provide the max liquidity reward with additional incentive boost back to the liquidity and token holders.
Trust by Ecosystems
We are making connections with wallets, aggregators and other protocols to make the ecosystem better
Built for the public good
Matmo is more than just a blockchain. It's an experiment in sustainable ecosystem funding fueled by protocol revenue. Retroactive Public Goods Funding is simple: you build for the public good, you get paid.
Many chains. One platform.
he Superchain is a horizontally scalable network of chains that share security, a communication layer, and an open source development stack. A permissionless system for deploying new chains to a shared network opens the door to massive scale, novel applications, and a new revenue model that rewards application developers for the fees their chains generate, and rewards protocol developers for the public goods they create.
That’s proudly a public good.
The Matmo is fully Open Source public good. Revenues generated by Matmo Mainnet, and eventually the Superchain, are used to fund the public goods which enable it.
This isn’t just talk—we walk the walk. Ensuring that impact to the Collective is rewarded by profit to the individual means that the Matmo will always stay winning. Summoning the Superchain, together.
MAMO Tokenomic and Distribution
Retroactive Public Goods Funding: 22%
Ecosystem Fund: 19%
Core contributors: 17%
Presale: 15%
Fluidity: 14%
Airdrop: 8%
Sugar: 5%
Audit and for User Security
All Matmo Contracts have been audited by Professional Auditing Organization. Their final audit report can be found in the following Github Repositories. All addresses used are open source and verifiable. An audit reduces the risk of smart contract bugs, but there’s always a risk. Invest only what you can afford to lose.
Audit

FAQS

What makes Matmo different?

Matmo is a Web3 platform that is secure, fast, and bridge assets. Matmo blockchain has leading advantages on the chain in terms of design architecture and technological innovation.

Why should I buy $MAMO?

Because MAMO is a super chain, a brand new public chain, with the potential to increase by more than tens of thousands of times.

How long is the presale?

The presale will be open until the hard cap is reached. The soft cap for the presale is 1 million USD.

Does the presale have a vesting period?

There is no vesting period for $MAMO. However if you stake your tokens during the presale they will be locked until launch day + 7 days.

When will the token launch?

We will launch $MAMO within days of the presale ending. We will keep everyone informed of launch day through our website and social media outlets.
